org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql.generator

Packages that use org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql.generator
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql.generator
CQL generators for Keyspace object actions.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql.generator used by org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql.generator
    Class
    Description
    ColumnChangeCqlGenerator
    Base class for column change CQL generators.
    IndexNameCqlGenerator
    Base class for Index CQL generators.
    KeyspaceNameCqlGenerator
    Base class for Keyspace CQL generators.
    KeyspaceOptionsCqlGenerator
    Base class that contains behavior common to CQL generation for table operations.
    TableNameCqlGenerator
    Base class for Table CQL generators.
    TableOptionsCqlGenerator
    Base class that contains behavior common to CQL generation for table operations.
    UserTypeNameCqlGenerator
    Abstract class to support User type CQL generation.
